ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the object */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the object */,
  "code_type" INTEGER /* Code type of the object */,
  "dynamic_memory" INTEGER /* Dynamic memory usage of the object */,
  "opaque_region" INTEGER /* Opaque region of the object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the object */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the object */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the object */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last accessed */,
  "last_accessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last accessed the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_code_type FOREIGN KEY ("code_type") REFERENCES code_types ("code_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_last_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the class (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_types" (
  "code_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code type */,
  "code_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the code type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the code type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the code type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, disbanded) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last accessed */,
  "last_accessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last accessed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_last_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_project_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_project_associations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_project_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
